items.name: mds-tokens
items.title: MDS Design Tokens
items.description: Medallion Design System tokens — resolved color (content, surface, fill, border, brand), typography (Inter font, type scale, weights, line heights), and shadows as CSS custom properties. Primary font is Inter. Icons use react-icons/bi (BoxIcons).

items.name: medallion-button
items.title: Medallion Button
items.description: MDS Button component — primary, secondary, tertiary, and destructive variants with optional leading/trailing icons and icon-only mode. Icons should use React Box Icons (react-icons/bi).
